# @web-tools/ui

Shared React component library, hooks, and design system for [trinhbentre.github.io](https://trinhbentre.github.io) tools.

## Install

```json
"@web-tools/ui": "github:trinhbentre/web-tools-ui#semver:^1.0.0"
```

## Exports

### Components
`AppHeader`, `Button`, `CopyButton`, `EmptyState`, `ErrorBanner`, `ModeSelector`, `ShortcutHints`, `TextArea`

### Hooks
`useCopyToClipboard`, `useKeyboardShortcut`, `useStorage`

### Utils
`formatBytes`, `isMacPlatform`, `modKey`, `shiftKey`, `getPlatformMod`, `getPlatformShift`

### Tailwind preset
```ts
import { webToolsPreset } from '@web-tools/ui/tailwind-preset'
```

### Base CSS
```css
@import '@web-tools/ui/styles/base.css';
```
